calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment (Default) Pursuant To San Francisco Local Rule 6.6(D)(7)
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Wanda Yip and Kik Lan Wong, a/k/a Jacky Wong.
Dept. 514. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Harvey W. Stein, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Matthew Wang, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Wanda Yip or Kik Lan Wong, a/k/a Jacky Wong.
Plaintiff's complaint for Open Book Account and Account Stated was filed on February 4, 2019.
Substitute service on defendants Wanda Yip and Kik Lan Wong, a/k/a Jacky Wong, occurred on February 24, 2019 and was effectuated on March 10, 2019.
Default as to defendants Wanda Yip or Kik Lan Wong, a/k/a Jacky Wong, was entered on April 10, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 16, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Matthew Wang, and against the defaulted defendants Wanda Yip and Kik Lan Wong, a/k/a Jacky Wong, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $39,135.50.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $607.00.

Total - $40,942.50.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2019 Continued To Dec-04-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2019 Continued To Oct-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
